type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Better quality fuel.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Better quality fuel

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Started using Natural Gas to reduce usage of fuel oil.  Previous emissions were calculated by the only emissions factor available for biogas which was biogas flaring however, Jason at NPRI provided a new method (after discussing with other co-workers) to calculate Biogas emissions from Biogas burned in our boiler.  Biogas emmission were calculated by using the Natural Gas spreadsheet provided by JTU Consulting however since it was Biogas the volume of Biogas was multiplied by the heating value of Biogas divided by the heating value of natural gas.  Also, our boilers are not >100MMBTU/hr and the fuel oil we now use for back up is No. 2 fuel oil instead of No. 6.
